title: Dendrophorbium longilinguae
taxonomy: Dendrophorbium longilinguae is classified within the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This family comprises over 23,000 species across 1,900 genera. Dendrophorbium longilinguae itself belongs to the genus Dendrophorbium, which is a genus of flowering plants native to Central and South America. The genus Dendrophorbium is a part of the tribe Eupatorieae, which is a group of plants primarily found in the Americas. Further classification of Dendrophorbium longilinguae within its genus and tribe is based on its unique morphological and anatomical characteristics.
